title: Stabilize Instagram native create_post workflow
description: Follow up on the Instagram social pack by validating the native create-post composer and publish selectors on-device. Current device state only reaches the photo-library permission priming gate (Continue), so create_post was intentionally not shipped. Exit criteria: confirm stable selectors through composer and publish, add workflow/card only if dry-run and commit-gated publish can be implemented reliably.

title: Add optional post-run cleanup controls for workflow commands
description: Expose opt-in end-of-run controls for iOS workflows: background app (Home), disconnect session, and lock device. Wire through worker shutdown + workflow/script options + ios_tools.sh global flags and docs.
close_reason: Implemented optional post-run background/disconnect/lock controls in worker + CLI + docs

title: Stop WDA to clear automation overlay
description: On real iOS devices, WebDriverAgent/XCTest can leave the 'Automation Running (hold volume buttons to stop)' overlay active after sessions end. Add best-effort WDA shutdown (GET /wda/shutdown) during session/workflow cleanup and expose a tool/CLI escape hatch.
close_reason: Implemented best-effort WDA/XCTest shutdown (GET /wda/shutdown) during session and worker cleanup; exposed ios.wda.shutdown tool + CLI commands; added DEVICE_LOCKED errorCode + workflow cleanup-on-error.

title: Validate Reddit DM workflows on unlocked device
description: Run reddit.open_inbox/open_dm_thread/send_dm/reply_dm_thread and social-card-run DM cards against an unlocked device. Tune selectors and defaults for account/locale variants and verify at least one commit-gated send/reply on a safe test thread.
acceptance_criteria:
Validate dry-runs for inbox/thread open + send/reply DM workflows and DM social cards
Capture working DM selector overrides in docs/reddit_workflows.md
Verify at least one commit-gated live send/reply on a safe test thread with explicit approval
Document selector drift and fallback guidance

title: Apply workflow input defaults during ios.workflow.run
description: Workflow JSON input defaults are not injected into vars before step interpolation, so placeholders like {{post_cell_predicate}} remain unresolved unless callers pass explicit args. This caused live Reddit workflow failures until manual overrides were provided.
acceptance_criteria: - ios.workflow.run merges workflow inputs.default values before executing steps\n- Placeholder-only values resolve without requiring CLI/env overrides\n- Add regression coverage for defaults in data-only workflows
close_reason: Workflow input defaults now merge before step interpolation, with regression coverage for required/default inputs.

title: App Store workflows: verify selectors, scroll, sort, and See All on device
RZN Phone Rename And Capability Contract Alignment
description: Normalize the phone automation repo/package surface under rzn-phone, align standalone versus umbrella invocation, and make the repo-local plugin/release naming honest about what is public capability naming versus internal iOS tooling implementation detail.
close_reason: Duplicate naming epic created during setup; superseded by phone-bsq.

title: RZN Phone Rename And Capability Contract Alignment
description: Normalize the phone automation repo/package surface under rzn-phone, align standalone versus umbrella invocation, and make the repo-local plugin/release naming honest about what is public capability naming versus internal iOS tooling implementation detail.
close_reason: Closed

title: Rename local repo and package surfaces from phone to rzn-phone
description: Bring the local folder, docs, manifests, and packaging surfaces into alignment with the already-canonical rzn-phone naming.
acceptance_criteria: Local folder/docs/package surfaces use rzn-phone; standalone usage is documented as rzn-phone ...; stray generic phone naming is reduced to internal-only cases where renaming buys nothing.
close_reason: Closed

title: Align umbrella and standalone command contract for phone capability
description: Document and codify the mirrored command grammar for the phone capability across standalone and umbrella usage.
acceptance_criteria: Repo docs/examples show both rzn-phone ... and rzn phone ...; public naming avoids leaking implementation-specific wording into the primary capability contract.
close_reason: Closed

title: Decide and migrate phone plugin or bundle naming boundaries
description: Audit ios-tools/plugin artifact naming and decide what stays as internal implementation naming versus what should align with the public rzn-phone capability.
acceptance_criteria: The repo records which names are canonical public names versus internal bundle names; release docs and backend publish flow stay coherent after the rename; compatibility aliases are explicit if retained.
close_reason: Closed

title: Sweep phone repo docs, scripts, and release paths after rename
description: Clean up repo-local docs, helper scripts, and release references after the naming normalization.
acceptance_criteria: README/specs/scripts/release references no longer assume the old local folder name; targeted validation commands still make sense after the rename.
close_reason: Closed

title: scripts: support IOS_WDA_LOCAL_PORT (avoid 8100 collisions)
description:
We hit Appium errors when local port 8100 is busy. Workflows now accept wdaLocalPort via session vars, but scripts/ios_tools.sh does not expose a way to set it.

Acceptance:
- Add IOS_WDA_LOCAL_PORT env (default empty) and plumb into the JSON-RPC session (wdaLocalPort).
- Update help text + appstore-smoke to use it.

title: Add installable rzn-phone runtime and workflow pack release artifacts
close_reason: Closed

title: Enhance Reddit workflows: skip promoted + extract title/body/comments
description: Current Reddit workflows rely on clicking the first feed cell and returning a compact snapshot. Improve selection (skip promoted/ads) and return structured extraction (title/body/top comments) so the host can draft higher-quality replies with fewer tokens.
acceptance_criteria:
- Identify and skip promoted posts when selecting the first post
- Return structured {title, body, subreddit, author?, topComments[]}
- Keep commit gate for submission steps
- Add a read-only workflow that does not post
close_reason: Added ios.reddit.open_first_post (skip promoted) + ios.reddit.extract_post and updated Reddit workflows to return structured details + screenshot.

title: Converge remaining phone worker internals on rzn-phone naming
description:
The public repo/package/script/bundle surfaces are now on rzn-phone, but internal Rust crate/package names still use rzn_ios_tools_worker and a few env/build paths still reflect the older internal naming.

Acceptance:
- Audit whether crate/package rename is worth the churn
- If yes, rename internal crate/package/output paths and update cargo/build scripts
- If no, document the intentional internal naming boundary once and stop revisiting it
close_reason: Closed

title: Fix social-card-run temp file collision under parallel runs
WDA build failing (xcodebuild code 65) on iGoobey; need signing/provisioning fix
description: Appium WDA build fails with xcodebuild code 65 when starting ios.session.create on device iGoobey. Need to verify WDA signing in Appium's WebDriverAgent.xcodeproj, set team/bundle id, and re-run build or set IOS_* envs.

title: iOS automation v1: primitives + workflows + packs
description: Build an iOS real-device automation runtime (ios-tools) with compact observe→act primitives, deterministic workflow runner, and versioned/signed workflow packs so we can scale prebuilt flows and later support LLM autonomy with low token usage.

title: Implement ios.target.resolve + ios.action primitives
acceptance_criteria: Implement ios.target.resolve(target_spec)->locator and ios.action.tap/type/swipe/scroll/back using encoded_id preferred; includes retries + clear error codes.
close_reason: Implemented native-app session kind, compact observe + resolver, and action primitives (tap/type/wait/scroll/swipe/back).

title: LinkedIn CRUD workflow pack v1 (phone)
description: Add first-pass iOS LinkedIn workflows for create/read/update/delete post operations with commit gates on destructive actions, plus runnable CLI helpers for real-device validation.
acceptance_criteria:
- Add JSON workflows discoverable by ios.workflow.list
- Create/read validated on connected device in dry-run mode
- Update/delete are parameterized with safe defaults and commit gates
- README/docs include run instructions and caveats
close_reason: Added LinkedIn CRUD workflow pack JSONs, CLI runner commands, and docs; follow-up validation tracked in phone-i1p.11 due device lock during later runs.

title: LinkedIn workflow selector hardening on unlocked device
description: Run linkedin.read_feed/create_post/update_latest_post/delete_latest_post end-to-end on unlocked physical device and adjust post-menu/edit/delete predicates for current LinkedIn build.
acceptance_criteria: - Validate read/create dry-run on unlocked device\n- Validate update/delete dry-run with real profile posts\n- Capture final recommended predicate overrides in docs

title: LinkedIn daily scroll digest workflow
description: Add a LinkedIn daily feed scroll workflow and CLI command that captures feed posts, parses engagement metrics, and writes a thread-style digest artifact.
acceptance_criteria: - Add linkedin.daily_scroll_digest workflow JSON\n- Add scripts/ios_tools.sh command to run workflow and emit digest JSON/Markdown\n- Document usage and engagement filtering
close_reason: Added daily scroll workflow, digest parser, CLI command, and docs; follow-up tuning tracked in phone-i1p.13 due locked device during live validation.

title: Tune LinkedIn daily digest parser with unlocked-device samples
description: Collect real rawLabel samples from linkedin.daily_scroll_digest and tune title/body/author/metrics heuristics so digest output is stable across feed variants.
acceptance_criteria: - Capture >=20 raw feed cards across multiple runs\n- Adjust jq parsing heuristics for author/title/body/engagement extraction\n- Document known parsing edge cases in docs/linkedin_workflows.md

title: LinkedIn interaction workflows for agent actions
description: Add LinkedIn workflows and CLI commands for post interactions (open/like/comment/reply) with commit gates and selector overrides so LM agents can execute engagement actions safely.
acceptance_criteria:
- Add data-only workflows for like/comment/reply interactions
- Add scripts/ios_tools.sh commands for each interaction path
- Use requiresCommit on mutating taps
- Document agent-safe usage and override knobs
close_reason: Added interaction workflows and CLI methods with commit gating; follow-up validation tracked in phone-i1p.15 due locked device during live run.

title: Validate LinkedIn interaction selectors on unlocked device
description: Run linkedin.open_post/like_post/comment_post/reply_to_comment end-to-end on unlocked device and tune predicates per locale/account UI variants.
acceptance_criteria: - Validate dry-run for open/like/comment/reply on unlocked device\n- Capture working predicate overrides in docs\n- Verify commit-gated live action for like and comment on a test post

title: Social card spec + LinkedIn/Reddit card catalog
description: Define social.card.v1 with standard browse/read/engage paradigms; add LinkedIn+Reddit card catalog and CLI runner; add pacing utility for human-like dwell windows.
acceptance_criteria:
- Add social card v1 spec doc
- Add LinkedIn+Reddit card catalog file(s)
- Add social-card-list/social-card-run CLI commands
- Add util.sleep tool and use it in card workflows
- Document safe agentic usage
close_reason: Added social card spec + LinkedIn/Reddit catalogs, social-card-list/social-card-run CLI, util.sleep pacing tool, Reddit engagement/digest workflows, and safety docs. Follow-up unlocked-device validation tracked separately.

title: Add one-click tester-side plugin import/unpack helper
description: Add a small tester-facing installer/helper that unpacks the shipped ios-tools plugin artifact, writes a ready-to-edit MCP config or host import instructions, and reduces manual setup after receiving the tester-kit ZIP.
acceptance_criteria: Tester can run one command after unzipping the tester kit to unpack the plugin and get a ready-to-edit local config/import path.

title: Expand bundle manifest to list full shipped workflow pack
description: Update the ios-tools bundle manifest so the resources list explicitly includes every workflow JSON that ships in the plugin, matching the actual payload directory contents.
acceptance_criteria: plugin_bundle/ios-tools.bundle.json resources list matches the full workflow directory and the built plugin ZIP verifies with all current workflows listed in plugin.json.
close_reason: Bundle manifest now explicitly lists the full shipped workflow pack; rebuilt artifact verifies with 28 workflow resources in plugin.json.

title: Add agent-oriented ios-tools setup docs
description: Add agent-facing setup and troubleshooting docs for Codex, Cloud Code, and similar MCP-capable agents, and include those docs in the generated tester kit.
acceptance_criteria: Tester kit ships a full agent setup guide and a compact handoff file; docs cover safe setup order, MCP config, read-only-first workflow policy, and common blockers.
close_reason: Added agent-oriented setup/troubleshooting docs and shipped them in the tester kit for Codex, Cloud Code, and similar MCP-capable agents.

title: Add ios.ui.observe_compact with encoded IDs
acceptance_criteria: Tool returns 2-4KB compact snapshot of visible actionable UI nodes with stable per-snapshot encoded_id, plus resolver hints; worker stores mapping for follow-up actions.
close_reason: Added ios.ui.observe_compact returning encoded ids and stored resolver mapping for follow-up actions.

title: Promote phone system starter examples into first-class phone workflows
description: The bundle now ships phone_messages / phone_calls / phone_notifications system metadata plus starter ios.script.run examples. Follow up by converting the starter examples into dedicated packaged workflows or first-class phone_* tools so quick starts can target stable operation IDs instead of compatibility examples.

title: App Store review posting workflow + proof/callback wrapper
description: Implements the phone-team spec for App Store review posting on real iOS devices. Scope: add a commit-gated appstore.post_review workflow, a job-file wrapper that uploads proof screenshots to R2 and POSTs callbacks, and document operational limits where scheduler/stateful throttling must remain external.
acceptance_criteria:
- Add a commit-gated appstore.post_review workflow that drafts/submits a review and captures launched/draft/posted artifacts
 - Add a job-driven wrapper that loads spec JSON, uploads proof screenshots to R2, and POSTs success/failure callbacks
 - Document runtime env/config and current limitations/selector-risk for App Store review UI
close_reason: Added appstore.post_review, the appstore_review_job.py wrapper, documentation, and the remaining deterministic app_url/app_id gap as follow-up phone-i1p.22.

title: App Store review flow: support direct app_url/app_id product-page navigation
description: appstore.post_review currently uses native App Store search by app_title because the workflow engine does not yet offer a deterministic product-page open path from app_url/app_id. This leaves result ordering as a selector risk for similarly named apps.
acceptance_criteria:
- Support opening the App Store product page deterministically from app_url or app_id
 - Remove the search-order dependency from appstore.post_review
 - Keep the existing dry-run/commit-gated proof contract intact

title: X native social workflows + card catalog
description: Add native X (Twitter) feed, thread, post, and DM workflows aligned with the social-card spec. Includes any small shared runtime changes needed to reliably target visible X timeline/comment rows on a real device.
design:
- Prefer native app automation (`com.atebits.Tweetie2`) over Safari web sessions because current Safari web automation attaches to the extension background page instead of the visible tab.
- Expose tappable row geometry from `ios.ui.extract_rows` so X workflows can tap rows by coordinates instead of timing out on secondary element lookups.
acceptance_criteria:
- Native X workflows exist for feed browsing, opening a post/thread, engaging with a post, and DM read/reply flows.
- Social card catalog exposes the X workflows with appropriate commit gates.
- Workflows validate against the connected real device and use selectors grounded in live X app UI.
close_reason: Landed native X workflow pack; remaining on-device validation and wrapper tooling gaps tracked separately

title: Build native Instagram social workflow pack
acceptance_criteria: - Add Instagram workflow JSONs for browse/open/read/DM flows and any stable mutating dry-run flows\n- Add cards/social/instagram_v1.json and register workflows in plugin_bundle/ios-tools.bundle.json\n- Validate browse/open/read and DM gate detection on a real device; run repo quality gates
close_reason: Implemented native Instagram workflow pack, validated browse/open/read and DM empty-state detection, and filed follow-up work for create_post and populated-inbox DM validation.

title: Add Google Maps mobile workflows for search, directions, and ETA extraction
description: Build first-class Google Maps iOS workflows covering place search, opening a location, and extracting route duration/ETA from directions UI. Validate selectors on connected device and add CLI helpers for running the flows.
close_reason: Added Google Maps starter workflows plus ios_tools.sh entrypoints; validated place-sheet extraction on iGoobey and captured follow-up for route-transition hardening in phone-i1p.26.

title: Harden Google Maps route transitions after place-sheet actions
description: Google Maps place-sheet search/open is stable, but post-place taps like Directions/Start are not yet deterministic on-device. Capture stable selectors for the route composer, mode chips, route options, and navigation-start confirmation so google_maps.open_directions and google_maps.start_navigation can report real route durations and state transitions consistently.

title: Interop Rollout — iOS Tools canonical package export + channelized publish parity
description: Track the plugin-side work needed for ios-tools to participate cleanly in the canonical plugin package interop model, including its mixed Rzn bundle + Claude dev-mount shapes and channelized publish behavior.
design:
Package facts:
- Package root: /Users/sarav/Downloads/side/rzn/phone
- Signed bundle source: /Users/sarav/Downloads/side/rzn/phone/plugin_bundle/ios-tools.bundle.json
- Claude dev-mount source: /Users/sarav/Downloads/side/rzn/phone/claude_plugin/ios-tools/.claude-plugin/plugin.json and /Users/sarav/Downloads/side/rzn/phone/claude_plugin/ios-tools/.mcp.json
- Current shipping shape: one MCP stdio worker, packaged phone systems metadata, packaged workflow JSONs, and packaged examples; no bundled skills or hooks today
- This repo already expresses two package shapes that must stay aligned: signed Rzn distribution bundle and Claude-compatible dev-mount plugin
- Existing publisher automation supports channelized release targets stable, beta, and nightly across local/cloud/all flows
- Shared release contract: /Users/sarav/Downloads/side/rzn/rznapp/docs/specs/PLUGIN_RELEASE_CHANNELS_AND_PUBLISH_CONTRACT_V1.md
- Aligned host rollout issue: rznapp-ifx.23

Implementation expectations:
- Keep both shapes documented and exportable without drifting metadata between them
- Preserve workflow-rich package semantics in interface metadata and downstream gallery/detail surfaces
- Keep tool-provider-heavy shape honest: do not synthesize Skills or Hooks unless they are actually added later
- Align publisher docs and release scripts with the shared local-first then cloud channel publish contract
acceptance_criteria:
A clear plugin-side interop plan exists for ios-tools, including both the signed bundle shape and the Claude dev-mount shape.
Plugin owners can implement canonical export and publish updates without rereading the original design thread.
The issue body points directly at the shared release contract and aligned host-side rollout issue.

title: Workflow packs: versioning + signing + install layout
acceptance_criteria: Define workflow-pack manifest + directory layout; add packaging script to sign/verify packs; worker can discover packs from configured dirs.
close_reason: Completed workflow pack distribution path for external evaluators: tester-kit builder, prereq/device doctor, sample MCP config, and tester onboarding guide.

title: Define iOS workflow JSON schema v1
acceptance_criteria: Schema aligns with rzn-browser-native step patterns (target_spec, expect, retries) and supports variable interpolation + commit gates.
close_reason: Added draft workflow spec doc + JSON schema (rzn.mobile.workflow.v1) aligned with observe/act, retries, commit gates, and tool-step escape hatch.

title: Add ios.script.run (deterministic runner)
acceptance_criteria: Accepts array of typed steps (tap/type/wait/extract/etc) and executes with retry/timeout, returning structured trace + artifacts on failure.
close_reason: Added ios.script.run deterministic runner with retries/timeouts and failure artifacts; workflow.run now supports JSON workflows with steps.

title: Reddit MVP workflows (read + comment) with safety gates
acceptance_criteria: Provide workflows: open Reddit, open first non-promoted post, extract title/body/comments, draft reply, require commit=true to post; works on real device.
close_reason: Added Reddit MVP JSON workflows with commit gate (read_first_post, comment_first_post) + CLI smoke commands.

title: Parity primitives: element getters + alerts + scroll_until
acceptance_criteria:
- Add WebDriverClient methods: element_text/attribute/rect and alert accept/dismiss/text
- Extend ios.action.* target selection with index and ambiguous handling
- Add ios.alert.* tools and ios.action.scroll_until primitive
- Add unit tests for new endpoint mapping
close_reason: Added element getters, alert tools, scroll_until, index/requireUnique targeting, and WebDriver element/alert endpoints with tests.

title: ASO: App Store native workflows (typeahead + search results)
description: Add iOS real-device workflows targeting the native App Store app (com.apple.AppStore): capture typeahead suggestions and search results, plus a rank spot-check for a target app.
acceptance_criteria:
- New workflows exist and are runnable via `ios.workflow.run` (e.g., `appstore.typeahead` and `appstore.search_results`)
- Workflows take inputs: query, country/locale, target_app_name (optional), limit
- Outputs include ordered suggestions, ordered results, and observed_rank for target app
- Artifacts captured: screenshot(s) + ui_source (or compact snapshot)
- README/docs include prerequisites (device unlocked, logged in, no destructive steps)
close_reason: Delivered App Store typeahead/search workflows, artifact export commands, docs, and real-device smoke validation.

title: App Store inspector: identify targets for Search UI
description: Run Appium inspector/observe_compact on com.apple.AppStore to identify stable encoded ids / locators for: Search tab, search field, suggestion cells, result cells.
acceptance_criteria:
- Documented locator strategy in docs (what we target and why)
- Workflow steps use encoded_id-first targeting where possible
- Falls back to accessibility id / predicate only when needed
close_reason: Implemented and documented App Store locator strategy in docs/appstore_workflows.md using real-device inspection.

title: Workflow: appstore.typeahead (capture suggestions)
description: Implement a read-only workflow that opens App Store Search, types a query incrementally, and captures the ordered typeahead suggestions list.
acceptance_criteria:
- `ios.workflow.run` returns JSON with per-prefix suggestions: prefixes:[{prefix, suggestions:[{text, position}]}]
- Supports `prefixes` input (explicit) OR derives prefixes from `query` (char-by-char)
- Supports `limit` and `typing_mode` (full vs char-by-char)
- Captures screenshot + ui_source (or compact snapshot)
- Handles intermittent popups; read-only; commit not required
close_reason: Implemented appstore.typeahead with prefixes[] support (or query-derived prefixes), ordered suggestions, screenshot, and ui source artifacts.

title: Workflow: appstore.search_results (rank spot-check)
description: Implement a read-only workflow that submits an App Store search query and extracts the top-N result rows, plus the observed rank of a target app by name (optional).
acceptance_criteria:
- Returns JSON: {query, results:[{position,name,subtitle,developer?}], observed_rank?}
- Captures screenshot of top fold + compact snapshot of results list
- Supports scrolling for up to N results (bounded)
- Robust to minor UI variations (A/B layouts) via observe_compact targeting
close_reason: Implemented appstore.search_results with ordered top-N extraction, bounded scroll, optional observed_rank, screenshot, and compact snapshot.

title: Runner output: save workflow artifacts to disk
description: Add a helper (CLI or script) to run the App Store workflows and save outputs + artifacts (screenshots, ui_source) to a specified output directory for ingestion by asoctl.
acceptance_criteria:
- `scripts/ios_tools.sh appstore-typeahead <udid> <query> --out <dir>` writes result.json + screenshot.png + ui_source.xml
- Output format documented and stable
- No secrets included in output files
close_reason: Added ios_tools.sh appstore-typeahead/appstore-search-results artifact export to result.json, screenshot.png, ui_source.xml.

title: Smoke: real-device App Store workflow test
description: Add a smoke test command that runs on a connected device and asserts we can capture at least 1 suggestion and 1 result row.
acceptance_criteria:
- `./scripts/ios_tools.sh appstore-smoke <udid> "voice notes"` returns exit 0 when successful
- Prints only high-level status (no secrets)
- Stores artifacts under a temp dir (prints path)
close_reason: Added and validated appstore-smoke command on real device (exit 0 with suggestions/results + artifact path).

title: Workflow runtime: data-only app workflows (no compiled app handlers)
description: Refactor workflow execution so app-specific flows (Safari, App Store, Reddit, etc.) can be fully defined in workflow JSON packs with reusable primitives + output templating. This addresses scaling concerns about compiled-in app handlers.
acceptance_criteria: - Add generic workflow output templating or result composition in runner\n- Migrate at least one existing compiled workflow to data-only JSON\n- Document migration strategy for remaining built-in workflows
close_reason: Refactored to data-only JSON workflows with output templating; migrated App Store + Safari workflows; documented migration strategy.

title: Add structured error codes for ios.action.* + ios.script.run
description: Today we mostly return string errors; add stable errorCode enums to structuredContent for ios.action.* and propagate into ios.script.run trace for programmatic handling.
acceptance_criteria: - Define errorCode enum (e.g., NO_SESSION, ELEMENT_NOT_FOUND, AMBIGUOUS_MATCH, TIMEOUT, ACTION_FAILED)\n- ios.action.* includes errorCode + details in structuredContent when failing\n- ios.script.run preserves errorCode in trace
close_reason: Added ToolErrorCode/ToolCallError with errorCode propagation into tools/call + ios.script.run trace, plus tests.

title: Publish install artifacts alongside plugin release flow
close_reason: Closed

description: Migrate ios.reddit.* helpers into data-only workflows using generic primitives (ui.observe_compact, action.tap/type, ui.extract_rows) and remove app-specific tool handlers from the core runner. Keep JSON workflows in packs.
close_reason: Removed app-specific tools from core; migrated reddit helpers to workflows.

description: Run reddit.open_post/daily_scroll_digest/like_post/comment_post/reply_to_comment and social-card-run wrappers against an unlocked device. Tune selector predicates and card defaults for account/locale variants; verify at least one dry-run and one commit-gated live interaction on a safe test post/comment.

title: Add git remote + push phone repo
description: AGENTS.md requires pushing to origin, but /Users/sarav/Downloads/side/rzn/phone had no git repo/remote. Initialized git + committed. Need to add correct remote (GitHub/private) and run git push.

title: Publish signed plugin ZIPs from GitHub release CI when signing material is available
description: The GitHub release workflow now publishes cross-platform runtime assets and notes, but it does not build signed plugin ZIPs yet. Add an optional CI path that uses repository secrets plus the plugin devkit to publish the signed macOS bundle when signing material is available.

title: Rewrite README as a product-first standalone install page
Validate X draft-cleanup and DM thread selectors on-device
Choose and add a public source license for rzn-phone
description: The repo can be made public, but public visibility without an explicit license is source-visible rather than open source. Pick and add the intended license file, then align README wording with that choice.

title: Validate Instagram DM selectors against a populated inbox
description: Follow up on the Instagram social pack by validating open_dm_thread/send_dm/reply_dm_thread against an account with real DM threads. Current implementation cleanly reports onboarding/empty-state screens and uses best-effort visible-thread selectors, but it has not been proven against a populated inbox on-device. Exit criteria: verify thread-row extraction and composer/send selectors with non-empty inbox data, then tighten selectors if needed.
